newTests.name: writes the full agent directory contract in the built CLI path
should set awesome and agent as default plugins if no plugins are provided
should not duplicate agent when explicitly configured
should append agent after configured plugins when agent is not specified
should honor disabled agent config
should use historyId-based file names and fall back to the test result id
should map enrichment findings to the intended remediation categories
should surface partial runtime modeling and high-signal stderr summaries
should build expectations from a harness request
should copy project guidance and reference it from AGENTS.md and run manifest
should prefer option outputDir over ALLURE_AGENT_OUTPUT
should clean only managed entries before writing
should include the setup and feature-delivery skills with UI metadata
should emit retry-evidence findings when retries do not add new signal
should prefer actionable missing-tool stderr over setup frame noise
should iterate retry scenarios and request per-attempt diagnostics
should do nothing when no output directory is configured
should keep markdown text readable without over-escaping test identifiers
should iterate when a failed test needs real steps and attachments
should include the project guide and AGENTS router templates
should write manifests, expected scope, and advisory findings
should iterate when runner failures exist outside logical test results
should emit bootstrap findings when no visible tests are present
should accept a clean scoped run from a real agent output directory
should fold retries into one logical file and suffix collisions
should reject scope drift from a real agent output directory
should reject high-confidence noop-style evidence
should keep findings empty for a clean expected run
should stream per-test markdown and event records before finalization
should include downstream enrichment best practices in AGENTS.md
should write index, AGENTS guide, and copied global stdout and stderr files
should add evidence findings and rerun guidance when a failed test lacks signal
should create bootstrap files immediately when realtime agent mode starts
should render fixtures, copy attachments, and keep missing attachments visible
